entries.name: Playwright Browser
entries.description: Headless Chromium driving via Playwright. Lets the agent navigate URLs, click elements, and snapshot pages.

entries.name: Filesystem
entries.description: Read + write files inside the current workspace. Defaults to the project root; pass an explicit directory in args to scope it.

entries.name: GitHub
entries.description: Read repositories, open PRs, manage issues. Set GITHUB_TOKEN in the env block to authenticate.

entries.name: Postgres
entries.description: Run read-only queries against a Postgres database. Replace the placeholder connection string in args.

entries.name: SQLite
entries.description: Query a SQLite database file. Replace the placeholder path in args with your `.sqlite` file.

entries.name: Knowledge Graph Memory
entries.description: Persistent knowledge-graph memory the agent can write to and recall from across turns.

entries.name: HTTP Fetch
entries.description: Fetch arbitrary URLs and convert them to Markdown for grounded reading.
